name: Campbell Soup - Scalloped Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cream of celery soup or
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the soup, milk, chopped parsley, and pepper in a bowl.
2. In a buttered 1-1/2 quart casserole dish, arrange alternating layers of potatoes and onion.
3. Dot the top with butter and sprinkle with paprika.
4. Cover and bake at 325°F for 1-1/2 hours.
5. Remove the cover and bake an additional 15 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
